message:
feat(fp-frame): add corr_min_periods and cov_min_periods for DataFrame

Add min_periods threshold to pairwise correlation and covariance
computation. Pairs with fewer than min_periods valid (non-NaN)
observations now yield NaN instead of attempting computation.
Refactors internal pairwise_stat to pairwise_stat_min with threshold
parameter; existing corr()/cov() default to min_periods=1.

4 new tests, 828 total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
